prs_created.description: feat(stdlib): add itertools module bindings (count, cycle, repeat, accumulate, chain, compress, dropwhile, filterfalse, groupby, islice, pairwise, takewhile, zip_longest, permutations, combinations, product)

merged_prs.description: fix(math): fix factorial signature and add missing constants/functions
fix(math): correct type signatures for copysign, fmod and curried bindings
ci: fix Python version from 3.10 to 3.12 (by dbrattli)
feat(math): add missing math functions (log/base, modf, frexp, ldexp, remainder, isclose, nextafter, ulp, exp2, cbrt)

notes: 10 unlabelled issues blocked by integrity policy (issues #134, #131, #117, #115, #65, #48, #36, #22, #15, #5). PR #252 is release 5.0.0-rc.4 waiting for merge. Repo Assist created itertools bindings PR (branch: repo-assist/bindings-itertools-module). Future candidates: functools, collections, datetime stdlib modules.
